debug_info.goal:
ι : Type u_1
Ω : Type u_2
E : Type u_3
inst✝⁴ : LinearOrder ι
inst✝³ : TopologicalSpace ι
inst✝² : NormedAddCommGroup E
inst✝¹ : NormedSpace ℝ E
inst✝ : CompleteSpace E
mΩ : MeasurableSpace Ω
P : Measure Ω
X : ι → Ω → E
𝓕 : Filtration ι mΩ
hX : @ProbabilityTheory.IsSquareIntegrable ι Ω E inst✝⁴ inst✝³ inst✝² inst✝¹ inst✝ mΩ X 𝓕 P
⊢ Submartingale (fun i ω => ‖X i ω‖ ^ 2) 𝓕 P

failed_attempts: hX.martingale.submartingale_norm_pow (by norm_num : (1 : ℝ) ≤ 2) (fun i ↦ hX.integrable_sq i)
hX.martingale.submartingale_norm_pow (by norm_num : 1 ≤ (2 : ℕ)) (fun i ↦ hX.integrable_sq i)

have h := hX.martingale.norm.pow_submartingale (by norm_num : (1 : ℕ) ≤ 2)
  convert h using 2 <;> simp [sq]

refine hX.martingale.submartingale_of_convex_comp (fun i ↦ hX.integrable_sq i) ?_ ?_
  · exact convexOn_pow 2
  · intro i
    exact ((hX.martingale.adapted i).mono (𝓕.le i)).norm.pow_const 2
hX.martingale.submartingale_norm_pow (by norm_num : (2 : ℝ) ≥ 1) (fun i => hX.integrable_sq i)

refine ⟨fun i ↦ ?_, fun i ↦ ?_, fun i j hij ↦ ?_⟩
  · exact ((hX.martingale.adapted i).mono (𝓕.le i)).norm.pow_const 2
  · exact hX.integrable_sq i
  · have h := hX.martingale.condexp_ae_eq hij
    filter_upwards [h] with ω hω
    have : ‖X i ω‖ ^ 2 = ‖(P[X j | 𝓕 i]) ω‖ ^ 2 := by rw [hω]
    rw [this]
    exact sq_norm_condexp_le (hX.martingale.integrable j) ω

refine ⟨fun i ↦ ?_, fun i ↦ ?_, fun i j hij ↦ ?_⟩
  · exact (hX.martingale.adapted i).norm.pow_const 2
  · exact (hX.integrable_sq i).mono' ((hX.martingale.adapted i).mono (𝓕.le i)).norm.pow_const.aestronglyMeasurable (by simp [abs_of_nonneg (pow_nonneg (norm_nonneg _) 2)])
  · have h1 : ∀ᵐ ω ∂P, ‖P[X j | 𝓕 i] ω‖ ^ 2 ≤ P[(fun ω ↦ ‖X j ω‖ ^ 2) | 𝓕 i] ω := by
      exact norm_pow_condexp_le_condexp_norm_pow (hX.martingale.integrable j) (hX.integrable_sq j) 2
    have h2 : X i =ᵐ[P] P[X j | 𝓕 i] := (hX.martingale.condexp_of_le hij (𝓕.le i)).symm
    filter_upwards [h1, h2] with ω h1ω h2ω
    simp only at h1ω h2ω ⊢
    calc ‖X i ω‖ ^ 2 = ‖P[X j | 𝓕 i] ω‖ ^ 2 := by rw [h2ω]
      _ ≤ P[(fun ω ↦ ‖X j ω‖ ^ 2) | 𝓕 i] ω := h1ω

refine hX.martingale.submartingale_of_convex_comp (fun i ↦ hX.integrable_sq i) ?_ ?_
  · exact ConvexOn.norm_sq (convex_univ)
  · intro i
    exact ((hX.martingale.adapted i).mono (𝓕.le i)).norm.pow_const 2

refine ⟨fun i ↦ ?_, fun i ↦ ?_, fun i j hij ↦ ?_⟩
  · exact ((hX.martingale.adapted i).mono (𝓕.le i)).norm.pow_const 2
  · exact hX.integrable_sq i
  · refine EventuallyLE.trans ?_ (norm_sq_condexp_le (hX.martingale.integrable j) (𝓕.le i))
    have h := hX.martingale.condexp_ae_eq hij
    filter_upwards [h] with ω hω
    simp only [hω]
